home.subtitle: A gamified path through halls, exhibits, timelines, and missions — all in the browser, with progress saved locally on your device.
home.featuredTitle: Museum-inspired visual identity, light or dark theme, three interface languages (Romanian, Russian, English), and a structure ready for content.

footer.tagline: Course lab app — client-side only, no server.
footer.storageNote: Your progress stays saved locally on this device.

placeholder.body: Content for this section will be added in later stages. Use the menu to return to the home page.

halls.title: Exhibition halls
halls.intro: Pick a hall to browse exhibits in a horizontal strip with filters for era, category, and your collection.

detail.subtitle: Scroll sideways to see every card. Use the filters above to narrow the list.

filters.empty: No exhibits match these filters. Try “All” or another combination.

actions.tooltipFavorite: Mark this exhibit as a favorite (like).
actions.tooltipAlbum: Add or remove from your personal album.
actions.tooltipStudied: Mark that you have studied this exhibit.

detail.noFunFacts: No fun facts for this exhibit.

timeline.title: Regional timeline
timeline.intro: Scroll the rail, open each event sheet, then try the ordering mission. Dates follow mainstream Bessarabia / Moldova histories.

rail.hint: Scroll horizontally — snap points keep each year card readable.

chronology.title: Mission: years in order
chronology.lede: Years are hidden. Use ↑ / ↓ to sort oldest → newest, then check.
chronology.hiddenYear: Year hidden until you finish the mission.
chronology.liveFail: Not yet in historical order — adjust and try again.
chronology.feedbackOk: Perfect — the rail now unlocks the chronologist badge if you have not earned it yet.
chronology.feedbackBad: Some events are still out of order. Tip: start with the fair (16th c.) and end with the 1994 constitution.

quiz.title: Museum quizzes
quiz.intro: Five questions each, immediate feedback with a short explanation. Save a pseudonym to the local top five if you like.
quiz.passed: You reached the badge threshold — see the cabinet.
quiz.retryHint: Open the other quiz or revisit the timeline, then try again.

cabinet.title: Explorer cabinet
cabinet.intro: Badges unlock from the timeline, quizzes, and mini-games. Leaderboards stay only on this device.
cabinet.lockedHint: Complete missions elsewhere to reveal this badge.

games.title: Mini-games
games.intro: Memory pairs with Bălți imagery, plus a timed hidden-relic hunt on Independence Square.

relic.lede: Three translucent hotspots hide on the square photo. You have 45 seconds after you press Start.

leaderboard.title: Local hall of fame (top 5)
leaderboard.note: Scores never leave your browser. Enter a short pseudonym after a quiz or game.
